text_original: The only one of these programs I have been willing to purchase lifetime membership for. I play with the advanced RPG model and not the default, and the stories I build with the bots can be deeper stories, letting me explore a wide variety.
text_zh: 这是这些程序中唯一一个我愿意购买终身会员的。我使用的是高级 RPG 模式而非默认模式，我与机器人共同构建的故事可以更加深入，让我能够探索各种各样的可能性。
reply_original:
Wow, reading your message just made our entire team's day! It is truly an honor to be part of your creative journey, especially knowing you chose our Lifetime Membership to explore those deep RPG stories. We are thrilled that the advanced model is helping you build such immersive worlds!

Your support is the fuel that keeps us going.
reply_zh:
哇，读到您的留言让我们整个团队都开心极了！能成为您创作旅程的一部分，我们深感荣幸，特别是得知您选择了我们的终身会员来探索那些深度的 RPG 故事。我们很高兴高级模型能帮助您构建如此身临其境的世界！

您的支持是驱动我们不断前行的动力。
